ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade level (e.g., Grade 3, Grade 4) */,
  "school_year" TEXT /* The school year (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the grade level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type (e.g., English, Math) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the test type */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the subject (e.g., ENG, MATH) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade level */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type */,
  "mean_score" REAL /* Mean score of the students */,
  "exceeded_standard" REAL /* Percentage of students exceeding standards */,
  "met_standard" REAL /* Percentage of students meeting standards */,
  "nearly_met_standard" REAL /* Percentage of students nearly meeting standards */,
  "standard_not_met" REAL /* Percentage of students not meeting standards */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* The date when the test was conducted */,
  "standard" TEXT /* The standard or curriculum being tested */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade level the student belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The student's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The student's gender */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student's parent or guardian */,
  "parent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student's parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_scores" (
  "student_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the student */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* The date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_scores_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educators" (
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator */,
  "educator_name" TEXT /* Name of the educator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the educator (e.g., teacher, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* The educator's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The educator's phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the educator belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade level the class belongs to */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator teaching the class */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* The number of students in the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_students" (
  "class_student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class-student pair */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* The date the student enrolled in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_students_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade level */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type */,
  "benchmark_score" REAL /* Benchmark score */,
  "benchmark_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade level */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report" TEXT /* Report details */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., mid-term, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_reports_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_reports_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_reports_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_reports_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role name */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission details */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id")
)
